headline: Crypto Market Update, Jan. 3: Ethereum Eyes $1k, Dogecoin Down 19%
summary: What Happened: Ethereum (ETH), the second leading cryptocurrency by market cap, has gained over 18.19% in the last 24 hours and was trading at $951.85 at press time, with a current capitalization at over $103 billion.

headline: Discovery+ to Be Available on Amazon Fire TV, Roku at Launch; Vodafone to Distribute Discovery+ in 12 European Markets
Tesla Model Y Deliveries to Start in China This Month
summary: Tesla Inc's (NASDAQ: TSLA) popular Model Y all electric crossover will start deliveries in China, Reuters reports.

headline: World's 4th Largest Automaker Set To Take Shape Monday
summary: Shareholders are scheduled to vote on the merger between Fiat Chrysler Automobiles NV (NYSE: FCAU) and PSA Group on Monday.

headline: Bitcoin Crosses $34k On Its 12th Genesis Block Day
summary: Bitcoin (BTC) price reached another all-time high — $34,000 in the early hours of Sunday (EST), marking the cryptocurrency network's 12th anniversary, known as Genesis Day.

headline: Will Tesla, Apple and Amazon Help The QQQ ETF Reach $400 By 2022?
summary: Every week, Benzinga conducts a sentiment survey to find out what traders are most excited about, interested in or thinking about as they manage and build their personal portfolios.

headline: Nio Launches 'NIO Certified' Used Car Service in China Amid Competitive Pressure From Tesla
summary: In line with its emphasis on service and support, Nio Inc – ADR (NYSE: NIO) has announced the launch of a used care service in its home market of China.

headline: 10 IPOs To Watch Out For In 2021, Including Petco, Poshmark, Bumble, Coinbase And More
summary: The $150 billion raised by IPOs in 2020 was the best since the dot-com boom era. Data from PricewaterhouseCoopers shows companies raised money through 183 traditional IPOs and over 240 SPACs in 2020.Here is a look at 10 companies expected to IPO in 2021.

headline: Nio's Record Run Continues as Deliveries Spike 121% In December; EV Maker Confirms Sedan Launch On 'Nio Day'
summary: Chinese EV maker Nio Inc – ADR (NYSE: NIO) announced record monthly deliveries for December that underlined the strong momentum the company is experiencing.
